data.name: Absorption Battle Racing
data.detailed_description:
Ultra high octane racing where you must absorb your fellow racers with your body! Absorption Battle Racing takes sexy girls and puts them in futuristic racing combat in trubite to games such as "Wipeout" and "Sonic Riders" but adds a twist of sexiness to the track. By absorbing fellow racers or being attacked by hazards on the track such as orcs or alien plants, this is racing like you have NEVER seen before!



Nattou Bomb joins with Shady Corner the creator of "Shady Lewd Kart" the worlds first lewd Kart racer to bring this Japanese take on lewd racing to steam! Now in English and Japanese!



-Take on the lewdest battle race in Championship Mode
-Explore themed tracks that will twist, turn and dive!
-Go head to head in Time Attack to break the clock...maybe even a womb.
-Over 30 racers on the roster to choose from!
-Use your skills to take down fellow racers and mess them up with sexual traps and moves!
-Create your own custom waifu to race around and "absorb"
-Loads of costumes, hairstyles and color schemes for you to customize your racer!
-Buy upgrades such as costumes, engines and custom sex positions for your girls!
-Direct sex scenes and absorbing modes in Gallery mode with dozens of unlockable positions and animations!
-Japanese and English text for the first time!

(All characters in game are 18 and over)

data.short_description: Ultra high octane racing where you must absorb your fellow racers with your body! Absorption Battle Racing takes sexy girls and puts them in futuristic racing combat!
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2ghz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 mb Video Memory
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: AMD High Definition
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2ghz
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 mb Video Memory
  • 音效卡: AMD High Definition
